name: Churu Fun Bites Dog Treats – Chicken Recipe Wraps (Chicken with Cheese Recipe)
shortDescription: Soft chicken dog treats with a creamy chicken & cheese center. Grain-free, low-calorie, high-moisture bites perfect for training, hand-feeding, and picky dogs.
description: Churu Bites Dog Treats – Chicken Recipe Wrapped with Chicken & Cheese Filling deliver a delicious two-texture experience your dog won’t be able to resist. Each soft, pillow-shaped bite features a gently baked chicken paste wrap filled with a rich, creamy chicken and cheese center for irresistible flavor in every nibble. Made with wholesome, high-quality ingredients you can trust , these treats use farm-raised chicken and contain no grains, preservatives, carrageenan, or artificial colors . The soft texture makes them easy to chew and perfect for hand-feeding, training, or even sneaking in small pills for picky pups. Each Tetra Fun Pack includes 8 individually portioned packs (about 12 bites per pack) to lock in freshness and prevent over-treating. With 69% moisture to support hydration and only about 15–18 kcal per pack , Churu Bites are a low-calorie indulgence you can feel good about giving daily. Enhanced with Vitamin E for immune support and Green Tea Extract as a natural antioxidant , these soft, savory treats are approved even by the most persnickety pups. Key Benefits Soft chicken wrap with creamy chicken & cheese filling Grain-free and free from artificial colors or preservatives Perfect for training, hand-feeding, or pill administration High moisture content to support hydration Low-calorie treat with added Vitamin E and antioxidants Individually wrapped portions for freshness and convenience Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended as a complete meal. Always provide fresh, clean water and consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible. Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 22.0% Crude Fat (min): 3.0% Crude Fiber (max): 0.5% Moisture (max): 72.0% Vitamin E (min): 80 IU/kg Energy Content: 1300 kcal/kg | approx. 15.6 kcal per pack (ME) Net Weight: 3.36 oz (0.42 oz × 8 packs)
